description: This file implements security-related functions for password hashing, verification, and JWT token creation and decoding within the project.

methods.name: str hash_password(password: str)
methods.description: Hash a plaintext password using bcrypt.

methods.name: bool verify_password(plain_password: str, password_hash: str)
methods.description: Verify a plaintext password against a stored hash.

methods.name: str create_access_token( *, subject: str, secret: str, algorithm: str, expires_minutes: int, additional_claims: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None, )
methods.description: Create a signed JWT access token.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] decode_token(*, token: str, secret: str, algorithm: str)
methods.description: Decode and validate a JWT token. Raises jwt exceptions on failure.

ctags.name: create_access_token
ctags.signature: ( *, subject: str, secret: str, algorithm: str, expires_minutes: int, additional_claims: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None, )

ctags.name: decode_token
ctags.pattern: /^def decode_token(*, token: str, secret: str, algorithm: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:$/
ctags.signature: (*, token: str, secret: str, algorithm: str)
